description: An orchestrated SDLC for AI coding agents — Angular Portal, NestJS, and Next.js stacks with explicit approval gates between every phase

plugins.name: sdcorejs-agent
plugins.description: Orchestrated AI-assisted SDLC for Angular Portal, NestJS, and Next.js. Turns Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Codex into accountable engineers on your stack — clarify → spec → plan → write code → review → ship, with user-approval gates between each phase and a documented audit trail.
